query:
INSERT INTO conferences (title, description, type, platform, host_user_id, host_name, room_code, scheduled_at, duration_minutes, max_attendees, status, recording_enabled, captions_enabled, actual_attendees, recording_status, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('UN CSW70 Main Event — Live Broadcast', 'Official UN CSW70 live broadcast event. Multi-platform streaming to YouTube, Facebook, LinkedIn, and Twitter/X. Open to all registered delegates and public viewers. A Voice for the Voiceless — Canryn Production.', 'conference', 'jitsi', 1, 'Valanna', 'RRB-CSW70-MAIN-EVENT', NULL, 180, 500, 'live', 1, 1, 0, 'none', NOW(), NOW());
